title: Doctors Warn About Tick Bites This Year
summary: Ticks are tiny bugs that can bite people and make them sick. Doctors are worried that this year might be a bad year for tick bites. Many people are already getting bitten by ticks. The CDC, which is a group that helps keep people healthy, told everyone to be careful. Tick bites usually happen a lot in May, but this year they are happening earlier. Doctors say that if more people get bitten, more people might get sick. Not all tick bites make you sick, but some can cause diseases like Lyme disease. It is important to check for ticks after playing outside. You can also wear long sleeves and use bug spray to keep ticks away. If you find a tick on you, ask a grown-up to help remove it carefully.

background_read: Ticks are small bugs that live in grassy and wooded areas. They can bite people and animals to drink their blood. Some ticks carry germs that can cause diseases like Lyme disease. It is important to check your body for ticks after being outside.
Article_Structure: WHO: Doctors and the CDC are warning people about ticks.
WHAT: Ticks are biting people earlier and more often this year.
WHERE: All over the United States, except the south-central part.
WHY: Because more tick bites can lead to more people getting sick.

perspectives.description: Doctors are worried that there will be more tick-borne diseases.
The CDC is telling people to protect themselves from ticks now.
